question: Identify the 5 suppliers with the highest average unit price of products supplied.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product) WITH s, avg(p.unitPrice) AS avgUnitPrice ORDER BY avgUnitPrice DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN s.companyName AS Supplier, avgUnitPrice AS AverageUnitPrice
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r0:supply]-(m0:Product) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.unitPrice DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the articles that mention the organization 'New Energy Group'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization {name: 'New Energy Group'}) RETURN a
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Article)-[r0:hasOrganization]->(m0:Organization {name: 'New Energy Group'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the first 3 genres of movies with the lowest average revenue.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH g, avg(m.revenue) AS avg_revenue ORDER BY avg_revenue ASC LIMIT 3 RETURN g.name AS genre, avg_revenue
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Genre)<-[r0:inGenre]-(m0:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.revenue ASC LIMIT 3

question: What is the total number of users who are VIPs for at least three different streams and are also moderators for at least one stream?
gold_cypher: MATCH (user:User)-[:VIP]->(stream:Stream) WITH user, count(DISTINCT stream) AS vip_stream_count WHERE vip_stream_count >= 3 MATCH (user)-[:MODERATOR]->(:Stream) RETURN count(DISTINCT user) AS vip_moderator_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:VIP]->(m0:Stream) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.count(DISTINCT m0) >= 3 RETURN n.name

question: "show me the oldest tweet id"
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tweet) RETURN t.id ORDER BY t.created_at ASC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.creation_at ASC LIMIT 1

question: List the 5 most recent users who started following 'Neo4j'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (neo4j:Me {screen_name: 'neo4j'})<-[:FOLLOWS]-(user:User) RETURN user.screen_name, user.name, user.followers, user.following, user.profile_image_url, user.url, user.location, user.statuses ORDER BY user.followers DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:FOLLOWS]->(m0:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.creation_at DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which users are amplified by 'Me' according to the AMPLIFIES relationship?
gold_cypher: MATCH (me:Me)-[:AMPLIFIES]->(user:User) RETURN user.screen_name AS AmplifiedUser
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:AMPLIFIES]-(m0:Me {name: 'Me'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Who are the top 5 users that a specific user named 'Neo4j' follows?
gold_cypher: MATCH (me:Me {name: 'Neo4j'})-[:FOLLOWS]->(user:User) RETURN user.name, user.screen_name, user.followers, user.following ORDER BY user.followers DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:playsWith]-(m0:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the average number of followers for users who are both chatters and VIPs of the same stream?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:CHATTER]->(s:Stream)-[:VIP]->(u) RETURN avg(u.followers)
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:CHATTER]->(m0:Stream)<-[r1:CHATTER]-(m1:User {name: 'VIP'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(nfollowers)

question: List 3 questions with the lowest score.
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) RETURN q.title, q.score ORDER BY q.score ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.score ASC LIMIT 3

question: What is the name of the organization with the lowest revenue that is mentioned in an article with a negative sentiment score?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE a.sentiment < 0 WITH o, min(o.revenue) AS minRevenue RETURN o.name AS Organization, minRevenue ORDER BY minRevenue ASC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:hasRevenue]-(m0:Article)-[r1:hasSentiment]->(m1:Float {name: '0.856'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.revenue ASC LIMIT 1

question: Find the `customerID` and `shipCity` for the customer with the highest total order value (sum of `unitPrice` * `quantity` for all their orders).
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[orders:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH c, o, sum(toFloat(orders.unitPrice) * orders.quantity) AS totalOrderValue WITH c, max(totalOrderValue) AS maxTotalOrderValue, collect(o.shipCity) AS shipCities WHERE size(shipCities) > 0 RETURN c.customerID, shipCities[0] AS shipCity ORDER BY maxTotalOrderValue DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Customer) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.customerID, n.shipCity

question: List entities that have undergone a company type change from the original registration.
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE EXISTS {     (e)-[:same_company_as]->(e2:Entity)     WHERE e.company_type IS NOT NULL AND e2.company_type IS NOT NULL AND e.company_type <> e2.company_type } RETURN e
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)-[r0:has_company_type]->(m0:Class {name: 'company'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the average `unitPrice` of products that have been ordered in quantities greater than 10?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[rel:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE rel.quantity > 10 WITH avg(toFloat(rel.unitPrice)) AS avgPrice RETURN avgPrice
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)-[r0:order]->(m0:Order {name: 'quantityPerUnit'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.unitPrice > 10 RETURN avg(n.unitPrice)

question: Who are the children of persons who are CEOs of public organizations?
gold_cypher: MATCH (org:Organization {isPublic: true})-[:HAS_CEO]->(ceo:Person) MATCH (ceo)-[:HAS_CHILD]->(child:Person) RETURN ceo.name AS CEO, child.name AS Child
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:hasParent]-(m0:Person)-[r1:hasCEO]->(m1:Person {name: 'public organization'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which users have an area less than 3 and have interacted with 'inchristbl.bsky.social'?

question: Which organizations have a revenue decrease mentioned in any articles?

question: List all people who have written and directed the same movie.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:WROTE]->(m:Movie) WHERE (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(m) RETURN DISTINCT p.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:write]-(m0:Movie)<-[r1:write]-(m1:Person {name: 'Keanu Reeves'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which top 5 people have directed movies with more than 200 votes?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.votes > 200 WITH p, count(m) AS num_movies ORDER BY num_movies DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN p.name AS director, num_movies
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:Directed]-(m0:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.number_of_votes > 200 RETURN n.name

question: Show the first 5 countries with the highest number of filings involving transactions under $500,000.
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS|:CONCERNS|:ORIGINATOR]->(e:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WHERE f.amount < 500000 WITH c, count(f) AS num_filings ORDER BY num_filings DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN c.name AS country_name, num_filings
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:Country]-(m0:Filing)-[r1:hasTransaction]->(m1:Entity {name: '500,000'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.number DESC LIMIT 5

question: Find streams where the user 'itsbigchase' is both a moderator and a chatter.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {name: 'itsbigchase'}) MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE exists{(u)-[:MODERATOR]->(s)} AND exists{(u)-[:CHATTER]->(s)} RETURN s
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)<-[r0:stream]-(m0:User {name: 'itsbigchase'}),(n:Stream)<-[r1:stream]-(m1:User {name: 'chatter'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which suppliers supply products with a unitsInStock value above 80?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product) WHERE p.unitsInStock > 80 RETURN s
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Supplier)<-[r0:supply]-(m0:Product) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.supplierID > 80 RETURN n.name

question: List the first 3 entities that are originators in filings where the originator bank is 'CIMB Bank Berhad' and the amount is above 500000.
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(e:Entity) WHERE f.originator_bank = 'CIMB Bank Berhad' AND f.amount > 500000 RETURN e.name AS originator_entity_name ORDER BY f.begin LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:originator]-(m0:Filed)-[r1:originator]->(m1:Entity {name: 'CimB Bank Berhad'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.amount > 500000 RETURN n.name

question: List the games that have been played by more than five different streams.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) WITH g, count(DISTINCT s) AS streamCount WHERE streamCount > 5 RETURN g.name AS Game, streamCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Game)-[r0:plays]->(m0:Stream) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.count(DISTINCT m0) > 5 RETURN n.name

question: Which categories have products with a unit price less than $10?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WHERE p.unitPrice < 10 RETURN DISTINCT c.categoryName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Category)<-[r0:hasParent]-(m0:Product) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.unitPrice < 10 RETURN n.name

question: Which user with a reputation over 1000 has asked the most questions?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE u.reputation > 1000 WITH u, COUNT(q) AS question_count ORDER BY question_count DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN u.display_name AS user, u.reputation AS reputation, question_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:hasReputation]->(m0:INTEGER {name: '1000'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the countries that have organizations with a motto.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(country:Country) WHERE o.motto IS NOT NULL AND o.motto <> "" RETURN DISTINCT country.name AS Country
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:hasCountry]-(m0:Organization)-[r1:hasMotto]->(m1:STRING {name: 'motto'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which users wrote reviews for businesses located on 'Main St'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WHERE b.address CONTAINS 'Main St' RETURN DISTINCT u.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:writeReview]-(m0:Business)-[r1:inCategory]->(m1:Category {name: 'Main St'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the total number of employees for all organizations that are headquartered in 'Rome'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (org:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(city:City) WHERE city.name = 'Rome' WITH sum(org.nbrEmployees) AS totalEmployees RETURN totalEmployees
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:in_city]->(m0:City {name: 'Rome'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.n.nbrEmployees

question: Which characters have an INTERACTS relationship in book 1 with a weight over 150?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c1:Character)-[r:INTERACTS1]->(c2:Character) WHERE r.weight > 150 RETURN c1.name AS character1, c2.name AS character2, r.weight AS weight
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:INTERACTS]->(m0:Character {name: 'book 1'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.weight > 150 RETURN n.name

question: Find the first 3 questions with no answers.
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.answer_count = 0 RETURN q LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.answer_count = 0 RETURN n.name

question: What are the IMDb ratings of movies that have a plot mentioning 'evil exterminator'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.plot CONTAINS 'evil exterminator' RETURN m.title, m.imdbRating
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:imdbRating]->(m0:FLOAT {name: 'evil exterminator'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.imdbRating

question: Which users with a reputation over 100000 asked questions that have been answered?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE u.reputation > 100000 AND q.answered = true RETURN u
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:reputation]->(m0:INTEGER {name: '100000'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the first 3 filings with a beneficiary bank located in 'Singapore' that have the smallest amounts?
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.beneficiary_bank_country = 'Singapore' RETURN f ORDER BY f.amount ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing)-[r0:has beneficiary_bank]->(m0:Entity {name: 'Barclays Bank Plc'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.country = 'Singapore' RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.amount ASC LIMIT 3

question: List the labels of users with a size other than 2.51 and an area greater than 2.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.size <> 2.51 AND u.area > 2 RETURN DISTINCT u.label
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.size <> 2.51 AND n.area > 2 RETURN n.name

question: List the top 5 organizations with the most diverse board of directors, based on the number of different industries represented.
gold_cypher: MATCH (org:Organization)-[:HAS_BOARD_MEMBER]->(member:Person) OPTIONAL MATCH (member)-[:HAS_CEO]->(:Organization)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(category:IndustryCategory) WITH org, collect(DISTINCT category.name) AS industries WITH org, size(industries) AS industryDiversity ORDER BY industryDiversity DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN org.name AS organizationName, industryDiversity
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:hasBoardMember]-(m0:Person) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.number_of_indonesian industries DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the top 3 movies with the highest budget to revenue ratio.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.budget IS NOT NULL AND m.revenue IS NOT NULL AND m.revenue > 0 RETURN m.title, m.budget, m.revenue, (toFloat(m.budget) / m.revenue) AS budgetToRevenueRatio ORDER BY budgetToRevenueRatio DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.revenue DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the names of people who acted in movies directed by Nancy Meyers.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person {name: 'Nancy Meyers'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) MATCH (a:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m) RETURN DISTINCT a.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:DIRECTED]->(m1:Movie {name: 'Nancy Meyers'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the top 3 highest rated reviews and which movies they are associated with?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) RETURN m.title AS movie, r.rating AS rating, r.summary AS review ORDER BY r.rating DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Reviewed) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.rating DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the top 5 largest amounts filed by 'Barclays Bank Plc' as the beneficiary bank?
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(e:Entity {name: 'Barclays Bank Plc'}) RETURN f.id AS FilingID, f.amount AS Amount ORDER BY f.amount DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Taxon)-[r0:has beneficiary_bank]->(m0:Entity {name: 'Barclays Bank Plc'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.amount DESC LIMIT 5

gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.score < 0 RETURN q.title, q.score, q.link ORDER BY q.score ASC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.score < 0 RETURN n.name

gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City {name: 'Seattle'}) WHERE o.revenue < 5000000 RETURN o
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:in_city]->(m0:City {name: 'Seattle'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.revenue < 5000000 RETURN n.name

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:CastFor]-(m0:Person {name: 'Tom Hanks'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n бюджет)

question: List the 3 suppliers who supply the most products that have been discontinued.

gold_cypher: MATCH (r:Review) WITH r ORDER BY r.stars ASC LIMIT 1 RETURN r.text
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Review) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n-stars ASC LIMIT 1

question: List the characters with a 'pagerank' between 0.5 and 1.0, ordered by descending 'book45PageRank'.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:pagerank]->(m0:FLOAT {0.5}),(n:Character)-[r1:pagerank]->(m1:FLOAT {1.0}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC

question: Which customers (show `customerID` and `companyName`) have placed orders that include the top 3 most expensive products?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) WITH p ORDER BY p.unitPrice DESC LIMIT 3 WITH collect(p.productID) AS topProducts MATCH (o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE p.productID IN topProducts MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o) RETURN DISTINCT c.customerID, c.companyName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Customer)<-[r0:order]-(m0:Order)-[r1:partOf]->(m1:Category {name: 'Chai'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.customerID DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the highest-grossing movie in the database?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.revenue DESC LIMIT 1

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)<-[r0:retweets]-(m0:Tweet)-[r1:mentions]->(m1:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Find all tweets posted by 'Neo4j' containing a hashtag.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)-[r0:created_at]->(m0 DATE_TIME {name: '2020-12-06T05:12:02Z'}),(n:Tweet)-[r1:hashtag]->(m1 Hashtag {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the id of the article with the earliest publication date?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article) RETURN a.id, a.date ORDER BY a.date ASC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Article) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date ASC LIMIT 1

question: List the top 5 products with the most units on order.

question: List the first 5 streams that have been moderated by the same user for over 5 years.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(u:User) WHERE u.createdAt < datetime() - duration('P5Y') WITH s, u ORDER BY s.createdAt LIMIT 5 RETURN s.name AS stream, u.name AS moderator

question: What are the top 3 most viewed games by streams that have a team?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) MATCH (s)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(:Team) RETURN g.name AS game, SUM(s.total_view_count) AS total_views ORDER BY total_views DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Game)<-[r0:plays]-(m0:Stream)-[r1:has_team]->(m1:Team {name: 'Rust'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.total_view_count DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the top 5 movies with the longest taglines?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline IS NOT NULL RETURN m.title, m.tagline ORDER BY size(m.tagline) DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.tagline DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the tags associated with questions asked by users with a reputation greater than 5000.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE u.reputation > 5000 RETURN DISTINCT t.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tag)<-[r0:tagGED]-(m0:Question)<-[r1:reputation]-(m1:Integer {name: '5000'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the first 5 questions that have exactly 2 upVotes.
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question {upVotes: 2}) RETURN q LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.upVotes >= 2 RETURN n.name

question: Find characters who have a book45PageRank less than 0.7 and limit the results to three.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.book45PageRank < 0.7 RETURN c LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:hasBook45PageRank]->(m0:FLOAT {name: '0.7'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.book45PageRank < 0.7 RETURN n.name

question: List the top 3 movies with the most revenue that have a runtime under 90 minutes.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.runtime < 90 AND exists((m)<-[:RATED]-()) RETURN m.title AS movie, m.revenue AS revenue ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.runtime < 90 RETURN n.name

question: List the names and titles of articles mentioning organizations that have been dissolved.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization {isDissolved: true})<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article) RETURN a.title AS articleTitle, a.siteName AS articleSiteName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Article)-[r0:hasOrganization]->(m0:Organization) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.isDissolved RETURN n.name, n.title

question: Which 5 questions have the oldest creation dates?
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) RETURN q ORDER BY q.creation_date LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.creation_date ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the top 3 articles mentioning 'New Energy Group'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization {name: "New Energy Group"})<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article) RETURN a ORDER BY a.date DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Article)-[r0:hasParent]->(m0:Person {name: 'Emil Eifrem'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.name = 'New Energy Group' RETURN n.name

question: What are the movies with a runtime exactly equal to the runtime of 'Toy Story'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie {title: 'Toy Story'}), (other:Movie) WHERE other.runtime = m.runtime AND other <> m RETURN other.title, other.runtime
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:has_keyword]-(m0:Keyword {name: 'Toy Story'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.runtime >= 81.0 RETURN n.name

question: List the top 5 users who have given the highest average ratings to movies.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WITH u, AVG(r.rating) AS avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN u.userId, u.name, avgRating
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:receives]-(m0:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.avgRating DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the average runtime of movies in the "Animation" genre?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre {name: "Animation"}) WITH avg(m.runtime) AS averageRuntime RETURN averageRuntime
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:inGenre]->(m0:Genre {name: 'Animation'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.runtime)

question: Find the organizations that are located in countries other than the United States of America.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(country:Country) WHERE country.name <> "United States of America" RETURN DISTINCT o
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.country <> 'United States of America' RETURN n.name

question: What are the first 3 movies where the main actor was born in France?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE a.bornIn = 'France' RETURN m.title LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:in_genre]-(m0:Genre {name: 'Adventure'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.country = 'France' RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the average total view count of streams that have at least one 'VIP' user?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:VIP]->(:User) WITH avg(s.total_view_count) AS average_view_count RETURN average_view_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)-[r0:hasUser]->(m0:User)-[r1:VIP]->(m1:Stream {name: 'VIP'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.total_view_count)

question: Find the characters with the top 3 highest 'book45PageRank' values who interacted with "Cersei-Lannister" in book 45.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character {name: "Cersei-Lannister"})-[:INTERACTS45 {book: 45}]->(other:Character) WITH other ORDER BY other.book45PageRank DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN other.name AS character_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:interactWith]->(m0:Character {name: 'Cersei-Lannister'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.book45PageRank DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the names of the organizations that are mentioned in articles published in the year 2019?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE datetime(a.date).year = 2019 RETURN DISTINCT o.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:in]->(m0:City {name: '2019'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which country has produced the most movies in the database?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) UNWIND m.countries AS country WITH country, COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS movieCount ORDER BY movieCount DESC RETURN country, movieCount LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.country DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the names of teams that have been involved with streams that play 'Just Chatting' and have total views over 1 million.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Team)<-[r0:plays]-(m0:Stream)-[r1:CHATTER]->(m1:User {name: 'Just Chatting'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.total_view_count > 10243195 RETURN n.name

question: What are the first 3 products with a reorder level above 20?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) WHERE p.reorderLevel > 20 RETURN p.productName, p.reorderLevel ORDER BY p.productName LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)-[r0:partOf]->(m0:Category {name: 'order'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.reorderLevel > 20 RETURN n.name

question: Which businesses in 'CA' have been reviewed by 'Jenny'?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)-[r0:in]->(m0:Class {name: 'CA'}),(n:Business)<-[r1:review]-(m1:User {name: 'Jenny'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What officers are shareholders of entities incorporated on '10-JAN-2006'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Officer)-[r:officer_of {link: "shareholder of"}]->(e:Entity {incorporation_date: "10-JAN-2006"}) RETURN o.name AS officer_name, e.name AS entity_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Officer)<-[r0:officer_of]-(m0:Entity)-[r1:incorporation_date]->(m1:Date {name: '10-JAN-2006'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the first 3 movies with the most number of associated actors?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(a:Actor) WITH m, COUNT(a) AS actorCount ORDER BY actorCount DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN m.title AS movieTitle, actorCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:has_actor]->(m0:Person) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.number_of_associated_actor DESC LIMIT 3

question: What are the first 5 movies directed by directors born in the USA?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:Director {bornIn: 'USA'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) RETURN m.title LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:DIRECTED]->(m0:Person)-[r1:bornIn]->(m1:Country {name: 'USA'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.name = 'first m' RETURN n.name

question: Find the customer who placed the order with the highest total quantity of products.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[oi:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH o, sum(oi.quantity) AS totalQuantityPerOrder WITH max(totalQuantityPerOrder) AS maxQuantity MATCH (o:Order)-[oi:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WITH o, sum(oi.quantity) AS totalQuantityPerOrder, maxQuantity MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o) WHERE totalQuantityPerOrder = maxQuantity RETURN c.customerID, c.companyName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Customer)<-[r0:order]-(m0:Product) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.quantityPerUnit DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who are the top 5 actors by the number of movies acted in the 'Adventure' genre?
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre {name: 'Adventure'}) WITH a, count(m) AS movieCount ORDER BY movieCount DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN a.name AS actor, movieCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie {name: 'Adventure'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.number_of_movies DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which three genres have the lowest average IMDb rating?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WHERE m.imdbRating IS NOT NULL WITH g.name AS genre, avg(m.imdbRating) AS avgRating RETURN genre, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating ASC LIMIT 3

question: Which 3 production companies have the most films with an original language of 'en'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:ProductionCompany)<-[:PRODUCED_BY]-(m:Movie)-[:ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language {id: 'en'}) RETURN p.name AS ProductionCompany, COUNT(m) AS FilmCount ORDER BY FilmCount DESC LIMIT 3

question: List all tweets by 'neo4j' that have more than 200 favorites and show the first 5.

question: How many different ports are used by applications named 'webserver'?

question: Show the names of 3 businesses with reviews from 'Bob' with a star rating below 4.5.

question: List the questions that have a createdAt date in 2019 and have been answered.

question: List the first 3 questions from users who have a link in their profile.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:hasRank]->(m0:Rank {name: 'pagerank'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.pagerank ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average total view count for streams that are VIPs of users with more than 10000 followers?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.followers > 10000 MATCH (u)-[:VIP]->(s:Stream) WITH avg(s.total_view_count) AS average_view_count RETURN average_view_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)-[r0:VIP]->(m0:Stream) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.total_view_count > 10000 RETURN avg(n.total_view_count)

question: List the questions asked by the user with the highest reputation.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) RETURN u, q ORDER BY u.reputation DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)<-[r0:asked]-(m0:User) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.reputation DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the top 5 movies by revenue that were released in languages other than English?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE NOT 'English' IN m.languages RETURN m.title, m.revenue ORDER BY m.revenue DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:hasRank]->(m0:Rank {name: 'movie'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE NOT 'English' IN n.languages RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the top 5 highest budget movies?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.budget IS NOT NULL RETURN m.title, m.budget ORDER BY m.budget DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n-budget DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which streams have the most languages? List the top 5.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)-[r0:has_language]->(m0:Language) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.creation_time DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the entities with a former name and their current name.

question: Which 3 products have been ordered the most times?

question: How many users have commented on the question with the title 'Neo4j- APOC trigger fires without any reason'?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:commentedOn]-(m0:Question {name: 'Neo4j- APOC trigger fires'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.count(posted) &lt 1587746198 RETURN n.name

question: How many questions are tagged with both 'graphql' and 'apollo'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(tag1:Tag {name: 'graphql'}) MATCH (q)-[:TAGGED]->(tag2:Tag {name: 'apollo'}) RETURN count(DISTINCT q)
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)-[r0:tagGED]->(m0:Tag {name: 'graphql'}),(n:Question)-[r1:tagGED]->(m1:Tag {name: 'apollo'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: Which persons have directed the most movies with a tagline containing 'world'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline CONTAINS 'world' WITH p, COUNT(m) AS movieCount ORDER BY movieCount DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN p.name AS director, movieCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:directed]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:tagline]->(m1:STRING {name: 'world'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all the answers with a negative score.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Answer) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.score < 0 RETURN n.name

question: List the first 3 organizations that have more than one investor.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)-[r0:ACTED_IN]->(m0:Movie)-[r1:released]->(m1:DATE {name: 'Christmas Day'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.number_of_movies DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the movies directed by a person who has also acted in a movie?
gold_cypher: MATCH (director:Person)-[:CREW_FOR {job: "Director"}]->(movie:Movie) MATCH (director)-[:CAST_FOR]->(acted_movie:Movie) RETURN DISTINCT movie.title AS DirectedMovies
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:createdBy]-(m0:Person)-[r1:createdBy]->(m1:Movie {name: 'movie'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the average number of employees for organizations that are suppliers to organizations in the same industry category as an organization named "Deja vu Security"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (targetOrg:Organization {name: "Deja vu Security"})-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(category:IndustryCategory)<-[:HAS_CATEGORY]-(sameCategoryOrg:Organization) WITH DISTINCT sameCategoryOrg MATCH (sameCategoryOrg)<-[:HAS_SUPPLIER]-(supplierOrg:Organization) WITH avg(supplierOrg.nbrEmployees) AS averageEmployees RETURN averageEmployees
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)<-[r0:suppliers]-(m0:Organization)-[r1:hasCategory]->(m1:IndustryCategory)<-[r1:suppliers]-(m1:Organization {name: 'Deja vu Security'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.n.nbrEmployees)

question: Find the filings where the 'originator_bank' and 'beneficiary_bank' are both located in the same city.
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.originator_bank IS NOT NULL AND f.beneficiary_bank IS NOT NULL MATCH (f)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(originator:Entity {name: f.originator_bank}) MATCH (f)-[:CONCERNS]->(beneficiary:Entity {name: f.beneficiary_bank}) WHERE originator.location = beneficiary.location RETURN f.id
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing {name: 'originator_bank'}), (m0:Filing {name: 'beneficiary_bank'}) RETURN n.locations = m0.locations AS answer

question: Find the top 3 articles that mention organizations based in 'Seattle'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (org:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(city:City {name: "Seattle"}) MATCH (article:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(org) RETURN article.title, article.date, article.sentiment ORDER BY article.sentiment DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Article)-[r0:hasOrganization]->(m0:Organization)-[r1:in_CITY]->(m1:City {name: 'Seattle'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the first 3 actors who have acted in a movie with a budget over 50 million USD.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.budget > 50000000 RETURN a.name AS actorName, m.title AS movieTitle, m.budget AS movieBudget LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.died > 50 RETURN n.name

question: Identify the top 3 organizations that have a public status and are based in 'Italy'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(c:Country {name: 'Italy'}) WHERE o.isPublic IS NOT NULL AND o.isPublic = true RETURN o.name AS organization, o.summary AS summary ORDER BY o.revenue DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization)-[r0:hasStatus]->(m0:BOOLEAN {name: 'public'}),(n:Organization)-[r1:in]->(m1:Country {name: 'Italy'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.number_of_subsidiary DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 3 movies with the tagline 'What price would you put on your health?'
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline = 'What price would you put on your health?' RETURN m ORDER BY m.average_vote DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:has_keyword]->(m0:Keyword {name: 'What price would you put on your health'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.price DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find 3 characters with fastrf_embedding values where the first element is greater than 0.5.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.fastrf_embedding[0] > 0.5 RETURN c LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:fastrf_embedding]->(m0:List {10}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.name > 0.5 RETURN n.name

question: Which organization in Seattle has the most employees?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City {name: "Seattle"}) RETURN o.name AS Organization, o.nbrEmployees AS Employees ORDER BY o.nbrEmployees DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.name = 'Seattle' RETURN n.name

question: Which 3 languages are most common among movies with a popularity score above 10?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:SPOKEN_IN_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language) WHERE m.popularity > 10 RETURN l.name AS language, count(*) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:has_language]->(m0:Language {name: 'en'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.popularity > 10 RETURN n.name

question: Which business located on 'E Front St' has the highest number of reviews?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WHERE b.address CONTAINS 'E Front St' WITH b, COUNT(r) AS reviewCount ORDER BY reviewCount DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN b.name AS businessName, reviewCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)-[r0:inCategory]->(m0:Category {name: 'business'}),(n:Business)-[r1:inPosition]->(m1:Position {name: 'high number of reviews'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.reviewId DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find all filings where the beneficiary bank country is 'United States'.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing)<-[r0:hasParent]-(m0:Entity {name: 'bank country'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.country = 'United States' RETURN n.name

question: List the first 3 organizations with the lowest revenue that are not dissolved.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization) WHERE o.isDissolved = false RETURN o.name, o.revenue ORDER BY o.revenue ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.revenue ASC LIMIT 3

question: Find the movies that have a release date after the year 2010.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.release_date.year > 2010 RETURN m
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.release_date.year > 2010 RETURN n.name

question: Name the top 3 Services listening on Port 80.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Service)-[:LISTENS]->(p:Port {port: 80}) RETURN s.name AS service_name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Service)-[r0:listening]->(m0:Port {name: '80'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.starting DESC LIMIT 3

question: Find the articles that mention organizations that have a revenue that is higher than the average revenue of organizations in their industry category.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(ic:IndustryCategory) WITH ic, avg(o.revenue) AS avgRevenue MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.revenue > avgRevenue RETURN DISTINCT a
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Article)<-[r0:mentions]-(m0:Organization)-[r1:hasRank]->(m1:Rank {name: 'organization'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.revenue > avg(n.revenue) RETURN n.name

question: Identify the officers that have a country code of 'KOR'.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Officer)-[r0:country_codes]->(m0:STRING {name: 'KOR'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Who has the most directed movies in the database?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WITH p, COUNT(m) AS directedMovies ORDER BY directedMovies DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN p.name AS director, directedMovies
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:Directed]-(m0:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find the user who has provided the answer with the highest score to a question tagged with "cypher".
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tag {name: 'cypher'})<-[:TAGGED]-(q:Question)<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer) WITH max(a.score) AS max_score MATCH (a:Answer {score: max_score})-[:PROVIDED]-(u:User) RETURN u.display_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:provided]-(m0:Question)-[r1:tagged]->(m1:Tag {name: 'cypher'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.score DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average `degree` of characters who interact with "Ryman-Frey" in book 45?
gold_cypher: MATCH (rf:Character {name: "Ryman-Frey"})-[:INTERACTS45]-(other) WITH avg(other.degree) AS avg_degree RETURN avg_degree
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:INTERACTS]->(m0:Character {name: 'Ryman-Frey'}),(n:Character)-[r1:interacts]->(m1:Character {name: 'book 45'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.degree)

question: Find the top 5 tweets by 'Neo4j' using a specific source.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)-[r0:NEEP]->(m0:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 5

question: Show the top 5 beneficiary entities based on the total amount received.

question: What are the top 5 countries based on the number of originator entities they have?
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) WHERE exists{(e)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(:Filing)} WITH c, count(e) AS originator_count ORDER BY originator_count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN c.name AS country_name, originator_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:country]-(m0:Entity) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.number DESC

question: What are the top 3 movies with the highest budget to revenue ratio?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.budget > 0 AND m.revenue > 0 WITH m, (toFloat(m.budget) / toFloat(m.revenue)) AS budget_to_revenue_ratio RETURN m.title AS movie_title, budget_to_revenue_ratio ORDER BY budget_to_revenue_ratio DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.revenue DESC LIMIT 3

question: Name the first 5 movies that were produced by a specific country, e.g., 'France'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:PRODUCED_IN_COUNTRY]->(c:Country {name: 'France'}) RETURN m.title LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:PRODUCED_IN]->(m0:Country {name: 'France'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.number_of_movies = 5 RETURN n.name

question: Who are the first 3 actors to have roles in movies with at least five different production companies?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:CAST_FOR]->(m:Movie)-[:PRODUCED_BY]->(pc:ProductionCompany) WITH p, COUNT(DISTINCT pc) AS productionCompanyCount WHERE productionCompanyCount >= 5 MATCH (p)-[:CAST_FOR]->(m2:Movie) WITH p, m2 ORDER BY m2.release_date ASC WITH p, COLLECT(DISTINCT m2)[..3] AS firstThreeMovies RETURN p.name AS actor, firstThreeMovies LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:playsIn]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:PRODUCED_IN]->(m1:ProductionCompany {name: '5'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.name ORDER BY n.date_of_birth ASC LIMIT 3

"

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Comment {name: '122427099'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.score

question: List the first 3 products with a discontinued status and a reorder level greater than 15.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product) WHERE p.discontinued = true AND p.reorderLevel > 15 RETURN p LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)-[r0:discontinued]->(m0:BOOLEAN) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.reorderLevel > 15 RETURN n.name

question: List the first 3 users who have more than 10000 followers.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.followers > 10000 RETURN n.name

question: Find entities that are of the type 'FOREIGN FORMED CORPORATION'.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)-[r0:FOREIGN FORMED CORPORATION]->(m0:Entity) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the top 5 streams based on their creation date.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.creation_date DESC LIMIT 5

question: Find the top 3 officers based on the number of entities they are connected to.

question: Show the first 3 businesses with names starting with 'Z'.

question: What is the lowest 'degree' value among characters in community 712?

question: Which actors have appeared in movies released in the 'Comedy' genre?

question: How many officers have the same name but different icij_ids?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Officer) WITH o.name AS officer_name, collect(DISTINCT o.icij_id) AS icij_ids, count(*) AS num_officers WHERE size(icij_ids) > 1 RETURN count(*) AS num_officer_name_conflicts

question: What are the top 3 most common languages spoken in the movies directed by Steven Spielberg?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)-[r0:has_description]->(m0:STRING {name: 'partnership'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List all organizations that have a revenue greater than $1 billion.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization) WHERE o.revenue > 1.0E9 RETURN o.name, o.revenue
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.revenue > 1000000 RETURN n.name

question: Which officers have a 'note' property that is not empty and are 'officer_of' entities with a 'struck_off_date'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Officer) WHERE o.note <> "" MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE e.struck_off_date IS NOT NULL MATCH (o)-[:officer_of]->(e) RETURN o.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Officer)-[r0:has_note]->(m0:STRING) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.date > date('2015-04-JUL-28') RETURN n.name

question: How many distinct `shipRegion` values are there for orders shipped to the 'USA'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order) WHERE o.shipCountry = 'USA' WITH collect(DISTINCT o.shipRegion) AS shipRegions RETURN size(shipRegions) AS distinctShipRegions
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order)-[r0:shipRegion]->(m0:STRING {name: 'USA'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n.shipRegion)

question: List the first 3 languages that have been spoken in the most adult films.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Adult)-[:SPOKEN_IN_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language) WITH l.name AS language, COUNT(a) AS film_count ORDER BY film_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN language, film_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Language)<-[r0:in_language]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:hasGenre]->(m1:Genre {name: 'adult'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 3

question: Name the top 5 movies that have an IMDb ID starting with 'tt'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.imdb_id STARTS WITH 'tt' RETURN m.title ORDER BY m.popularity DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:imdb_id]->(m0:STRING {name: 'tt'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 5

question: Find the top 5 streams with the most total view count that use English language.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language {name: 'en'}) RETURN s.name, s.total_view_count ORDER BY s.total_view_count DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)-[r0:hasLanguage]->(m0:Language {name: 'English'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.total_view_count DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the top 3 orders with the highest freight charges.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order) RETURN o ORDER BY o.freight DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.freight DESC LIMIT 3

question: List the top 5 shortest movies with an imdbRating above 6.0.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.imdbRating > 6.0 AND m.runtime IS NOT NULL RETURN m ORDER BY m.runtime ASC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:imdbRating]->(m0:FLOAT {name: '6.0'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.height ASC LIMIT 5

question: Which addresses are associated with entities that have an `incorporation_date` in January 2006?
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity) WHERE e.incorporation_date =~ '..-JAN-2006' MATCH (e)-[:registered_address]->(a:Address) RETURN DISTINCT a.address
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Address)<-[r0:associated_with]-(m0:Entity)-[r1:incorporation_date]->(m1:DATE {name: 'January 2006'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the top 5 most recent questions with a score less than -3.

question: What are the top 3 languages for movies produced by 'Pixar Animation Studios'?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:PRODUCED_BY]->(m0:ProductionCompany {name: 'Pixar Animation Studios'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.original_language DESC LIMIT 3

question: Which users have 'Neo4j' mentioned in its tweets the most?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) RETURN u.name AS user, count(t) AS mentions ORDER BY mentions DESC LIMIT 10
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:tweet]-(m0:Tweet {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the total number of interfaces that are being routed by the network with IP '10.2'?

question: List the products that have a 'reorderLevel' equal to the average 'reorderLevel' of all products in their category.
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WITH c.categoryID AS categoryID, avg(p.reorderLevel) AS avgReorderLevel MATCH (p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WHERE c.categoryID = categoryID AND p.reorderLevel = avgReorderLevel RETURN p.productName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)-[r0:reorderLevel]->(m0:INTEGER)<-[r1:reorderLevel]-(m1:Product) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which user has the lowest average review stars? Display top 3 users.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review) WITH u, AVG(r.stars) AS avg_stars ORDER BY avg_stars ASC LIMIT 3 RETURN u.name AS user, avg_stars
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n-stars ASC LIMIT 3

question: Which characters interacted with both "Catelyn-Stark" and "Cersei-Lannister"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (catelyn:Character {name: "Catelyn-Stark"})-[:INTERACTS]->(catelyn_interaction) WITH catelyn, count(DISTINCT catelyn_interaction) AS catelyn_interactions MATCH (cersei:Character {name: "Cersei-Lannister"})-[:INTERACTS]->(cersei_interaction) WITH catelyn, cersei,  catelyn_interactions, count(DISTINCT cersei_interaction) AS cersei_interactions MATCH (catelyn)-[:INTERACTS]->(common_interaction)<-[:INTERACTS]-(cersei) RETURN DISTINCT common_interaction.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)<-[r0:interacts]-(m0:Painting {name: 'Catelyn-Stark'}),(n:Character)<-[r1:interacts]-(m1:Painting {name: 'Cersei-Lannister'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Find all movies that have a release date in a leap year.

question: Find the body_markdown of answers provided to questions that have been asked by users who have commented on questions that have been answered by the user with the highest number of provided answers and have a view count greater than 50.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer) WITH u, count(a) AS provided_answer_count ORDER BY provided_answer_count DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (u)-[:PROVIDED]->(answer:Answer)-[:ANSWERED]->(q:Question) MATCH (q)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(c:Comment)<-[:COMMENTED]-(commenter:User) MATCH (commenter)-[:COMMENTED]->(comment:Comment)-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(target_question:Question) WHERE target_question.view_count > 50 MATCH (target_question)<-[:ANSWERED]-(final_answer:Answer) RETURN final_answer.body_markdown
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Answer)<-[r0:Provide]-(m0:Question)<-[r1:COMMENTED_ON]-(m1:Answer {name: 'question'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.body_markdown > 50 RETURN n.name

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Customer)-[r0:NULL]->(m0:Null) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the average length of the reviews written by each user?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review) WITH u, avg(size(r.text)) AS avgReviewLength RETURN u.name AS userName, avgReviewLength
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Review)<-[r0:createdBy]-(m0:User) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.long)

question: List all businesses that have been reviewed by 'Jenny'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {name: 'Jenny'})-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) RETURN b.name AS businessName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:review]-(m0:User {name: 'Jenny'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Find the businesses with addresses starting with '301' and list their categories.
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:Category) WHERE b.address STARTS WITH '301' RETURN b.name AS businessName, c.name AS categoryName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.address = '301 E Main St' RETURN n.name

question: Which city has the most organizations with public status?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Organization {isPublic: true})-[:IN_CITY]->(c:City) RETURN c.name AS City, count(o) AS NumberOfPublicOrganizations ORDER BY NumberOfPublicOrganizations DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:City)<-[r0:in_city]-(m0:Organization)-[r1:hasPublic]->(m1:BOOLEAN {name: 'public'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of the first 3 routers located in zone 1 in the data center?
gold_cypher: MATCH (dc:DataCenter {name: 'DC1'})-[:CONTAINS]->(r:Router {zone: 1}) RETURN r.name ORDER BY r.name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Router)-[r0:zone]->(m0:Integer {1}), WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 3

question: Identify the first 5 actors who have acted in movies with a budget less than 50 million dollars.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.budget < 50000000 RETURN a LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)<-[r0:ACTED_IN]-(m0:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.due < 50 RETURN n.name

question: Which 3 countries have produced the most movies with a runtime longer than 120 minutes?

question: How many users have written reviews for 'Missoula Public Library'?

question: Which entities benefited from filings where the beneficiary bank is located in the United Kingdom?

question: List the orders placed by customers in 'Berlin' that have a shipped date in 1997.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE c.city = 'Berlin' AND o.shippedDate STARTS WITH '1997' RETURN o.orderID AS orderID, o.shippedDate AS shippedDate, c.companyName AS customerName, p.productName AS productName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order)<-[r0:order]-(m0:Customer)-[r1:shipping]->(m1:Date {name: '1997-08-01'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List all users retweeted by 'Me'.

question: List the top 5 comments with a link containing 'neomodel'.

question: List the first 5 orders that included products from at least three different categories.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product)-[:PART_OF]->(c:Category) WITH o, COUNT(DISTINCT c.categoryID) AS categoryCount WHERE categoryCount >= 3 RETURN o.orderID, o.orderDate, o.shipName, o.shipCity, o.shipCountry ORDER BY o.orderDate LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order)<-[r0:order]-(m0:Product)-[r1:partOf]->(m1:Category {name: 'at least three different categories'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.orderID ASC LIMIT 5

question: What is the total revenue generated by orders shipped in the year 1996?
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[orders:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE o.shippedDate STARTS WITH '1996' WITH o, toFloat(orders.unitPrice) * orders.quantity AS revenue RETURN sum(revenue) AS totalRevenue
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Order) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.date.year = 1996 RETURN n.totalRevenue

question: List the top 3 videos that have been produced by 'Pixar Animation Studios' and have a runtime shorter than 50 minutes.

question: List the first 3 valid_until dates for relationships connected to Addresses.

question: Which products have been ordered on dates later than '1997-01-01'?

question: Which actors have starred in both a 'Comedy' and a 'Drama' movie?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)<-[r0:starred]-(m0:Movie {name: 'Comedy'}),(n:Actor)<-[r1:starred]-(m1:Movie {name: 'Drama'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the total number of filings where the 'originator_lng' and 'beneficiary_lng' values are within 10 degrees of each other?

question: List the body_markdown of the comments associated with the question with the highest view count.

question: Find all entities with a struck_off_date in February 2013 and a service provider of 'Mossack Fonseca'.

question: What is the average number of followers for streams that have the language "en" and have at least one moderator who also moderates a stream with the language "ru" and have at least one VIP?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language) WHERE l.name = "en" MATCH (s)-[:MODERATOR]->(m:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(s2:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(l2:Language) WHERE l2.name = "ru" AND EXISTS ((s)-[:VIP]->()) WITH DISTINCT s RETURN avg(s.followers) AS average_followers

question: Which questions have a link containing 'stackoverflow.com/questions'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.link CONTAINS 'stackoverflow.com/questions' RETURN q.title AS title, q.link AS link
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)-[r0:link]->(m0:STRING {name: 'stackoverflow.com/questions'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the movies where the original language is not English.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie)-[:ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE]->(l:Language) WHERE l.id <> 'en' RETURN m.title AS MovieTitle, l.name AS OriginalLanguage
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)<-[r0:ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE]-(m0:Language {name: 'en'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.original_language <> 'en' RETURN n.name

question: Who has 'Neo4j' retweeted the most? List the top 3 users.
gold_cypher: MATCH (neo:User {name: 'Neo4j'})-[:POSTS]->(tweet:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(retweetedTweet:Tweet)-[:POSTS]-(retweetedUser:User) WHERE neo.name IS NOT NULL RETURN retweetedUser.name, count(retweetedTweet) AS retweets ORDER BY retweets DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:retweeted]->(m0:Tweet {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.creation_at DESC

question: Which businesses are located in Missoula and have a businessId starting with 'b3'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business) WHERE b.city = 'Missoula' AND b.businessId STARTS WITH 'b3' RETURN b.name, b.address, b.businessId
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)-[r0:in]->(m0:POINT {name: 'Missoula'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.businessId = 'b3' RETURN n.name

question: How many filings have a beneficiary bank from 'United States' and an amount less than 500000?
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(e:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country {name: 'United States'}) WHERE f.amount < 500000 RETURN count(f) AS NumberOfFilings
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing)-[r0:has beneficiary bank]->(m0:Entity {name: 'United States'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.amount < 500000 RETURN n.name

question: What are the countries associated with intermediaries in the dataset?
gold_cypher: MATCH (i:Intermediary) RETURN DISTINCT i.countries AS Countries
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Intermediary)-[r0:intermediary_of]->(m0:Entity {name: 'dataset'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.country

question: What is the average number of followers for users who have been mentioned in the same tweets as users followed by 'Neo4j'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (neo4j:User {screen_name: 'Neo4j'}) MATCH (neo4j)-[:FOLLOWS]->(followedUser:User) MATCH (followedUser)<-[:MENTIONS]-(tweet:Tweet) MATCH (tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(otherUser:User) WHERE otherUser <> neo4j WITH DISTINCT otherUser RETURN avg(otherUser.followers) AS average_followers
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:FOLLOWS]->(m0:Tweet)<-[r1:FOLLOWS]-(m1:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.followers)

question: List the top 5 movies with the most IMDb votes.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) RETURN m.title, m.imdbVotes ORDER BY m.imdbVotes DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.imdbVotes DESC LIMIT 5

question: Show the top 5 movies with a poster path ending in '.jpg'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.poster_path IS NOT NULL AND m.poster_path ENDS WITH '.jpg' RETURN m.title, m.poster_path ORDER BY m.popularity DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:has_keyword]->(m0:Keyword {name: 'jpg'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the average number of votes for movies released in the same year "Speed Racer" was released?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie {title: 'Speed Racer'}) WITH m.released AS releaseYear MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.released = releaseYear RETURN avg(m.votes) AS averageVotes
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:releases]->(m0:Integer)<-[r1:releases]-(m1:Movie {name: 'Speed Racer'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.votes)

question: "Which pair of directors has the maximal number of actors who acted in at least one movie directed by each director?"
gold_cypher: MATCH (d1:Person)-[:DIRECTED]->(m1:Movie)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(a:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m2:Movie)<-[:DIRECTED]-(d2:Person) WHERE id(d1) < id(d2) WITH d1, d2, COUNT(DISTINCT a) AS common_actors ORDER BY common_actors DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN d1.name AS Director1, d2.name AS Director2, common_actors
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:director]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:DIRECTED]->(m1:Movie {name: 'at least one'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.number_of_actors DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the display names of users who have asked questions that have been answered by a user who has a display name that ends with a specific letter and tagged them with "neo4j".
gold_cypher: MATCH (u1:User)-[:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer)-[:ANSWERED]->(q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'neo4j'}) WHERE u1.display_name ENDS WITH 'n' WITH DISTINCT q MATCH (u2:User)-[:ASKED]->(q) RETURN DISTINCT u2.display_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:asked]-(m0:Question)-[r1:tagged]->(m1:Tag {name: 'neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.display_name ends WITH a specific letter RETURN n.name

question: Which users are located in "Sweden" and follow "Neo4j"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:User {name: 'Neo4j'})-[:FOLLOWS]->(m:User {location: 'Sweden'}) RETURN m.screen_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:location]->(m0:STRING {name: 'Sweden'}),(n:User)-[r1:following]->(m1:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

gold_cypher: MATCH (app:Application {name: 'crm'})-[:LISTENS]->(port:Port) RETURN port.port AS Port
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Port)<-[r0:listening]-(m0:Application {name: 'crm'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Can you list all tags associated with questions asked by the user 'Anu'?

question: What is the average unit price of products ordered by customers who have placed more than 5 orders?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order) WITH c, count(o) AS orderCount WHERE orderCount > 5 MATCH (c)-[:PURCHASED]->(:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) RETURN avg(toFloat(p.unitPrice)) AS averageUnitPrice
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)<-[r0:orderedBy]-(m0:Customer)-[r1:orderedBy]->(m1:Product {name: '5'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN avg(n.unitPrice)

question: Show the tweets that replied to a tweet by 'neo4j' and list the first 3.

question: Name the first 3 people born before 1950 who have written a movie with a tagline mentioning 'journey'.

question: What is the total number of questions asked by users with a reputation greater than the average reputation of all users?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User) WITH avg(u.reputation) AS averageReputation MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question) WHERE u.reputation > averageReputation RETURN count(DISTINCT q) AS questionCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)<-[r0:asked]-(m0:User)-[r1:reputation]->(m1:INTEGER {name: 'greater than'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: List the first 3 movies that were produced by 'Pixar Animation Studios' and have a budget over $100 million.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:PRODUCED_BY]->(m0:ProductionCompany {name: 'Pixar Animation Studios'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.budget > 100 RETURN n.name

question: Which users have written reviews for businesses in the same category as 'Imagine Nation Brewing' and have an average rating higher than 3?

question: Which intermediaries are connected to more than one entity and list their names.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Intermediary)<-[r0:intermediary_of]-(m0:Entity) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Find the 3 streams that have the most distinct games played.

question: What are the top 5 movies with the most number of spoken languages?

question: What is the total revenue generated from each customer?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Customer) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.totalRevenue

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Interface)-[r0:CONNECTS]->(m0:Network {name: 'zone 1'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.ip

question: List all movies that have a revenue greater than their budget.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.revenue > m.budget RETURN m.title
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.revenue > n бюджет RETURN n.name

question: "How many movies that are directed by Tom Hanks have \"love\" in the tagline?"
gold_cypher: MATCH (:Person {name: "Tom Hanks"})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WHERE m.tagline CONTAINS "love" RETURN COUNT(m) AS MoviesWithLoveInTagline
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:DIRECTED]->(m0:Person {name: 'Tom Hanks'}),(n:Movie)-[r1:tagline]->(m1:STRING {name: 'love'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: Identify the top 5 articles with a positive sentiment greater than 0.8.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Article) WHERE a.sentiment > 0.8 RETURN a ORDER BY a.sentiment DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Article)-[r0:has_sentiment]->(m0:FLOAT {name: '0.8'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Find businesses that have been reviewed by users whose name starts with 'J'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WROTE]->(r:Review)-[:REVIEWS]->(b:Business) WHERE u.name STARTS WITH 'J' RETURN b.name AS businessName, b.address AS businessAddress, b.city AS businessCity, b.state AS businessState
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business)<-[r0:review]-(m0:User)-[r1:name]->(m1:STRING {name: 'J'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the names of the organizations that have a CEO with a summary mentioning 'CEO at Accenture'?

question: What are the names of the top 5 organizations in terms of number of employees?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.nbrEmployees DESC LIMIT 5

question: Find the names of businesses that have received reviews from more than one user.

question: List the top 3 users who have rated at least one movie in each genre available.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH u, collect(DISTINCT g.name) AS genresRated, count(DISTINCT g.name) AS genreCount MATCH (g2:Genre) WITH u, genresRated, genreCount, collect(DISTINCT g2.name) AS allGenres WHERE genreCount = size(allGenres) RETURN u.name AS userName, size(genresRated) AS genresRatedCount ORDER BY genresRatedCount DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:rated]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:inGenre]->(m1:Genre {name: 'Adventure'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.userId DESC LIMIT 3

question: Identify the top 5 characters based on the average of their centrality values across all books.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.centrality IS NOT NULL   AND exists {(c)-[:INTERACTS1]->()}   AND exists {(c)-[:INTERACTS2]->()}   AND exists {(c)-[:INTERACTS3]->()}   AND exists {(c)-[:INTERACTS45]->()} WITH c,    (coalesce(c.book1PageRank, 0) +     coalesce(c.book45PageRank, 0) +    coalesce(c.pagerank, 0)) / 3 AS avgCentrality RETURN c.name AS character, avgCentrality ORDER BY avgCentrality DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.centrality DESC LIMIT 5
