question: Show the top 3 streams with the most moderators.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)<-[:MODERATOR]-(u:User) WITH s, COUNT(u) AS moderator_count ORDER BY moderator_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN s.name AS stream_name, moderator_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)-[r0:MODERATOR]->(m0:User) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.creation_time DESC LIMIT 3

question: Identify characters who have both high pagerank and high degree of centrality. Limit to top 5.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.pagerank > 8.0 AND c.degree > 250.0 RETURN c.name, c.pagerank, c.degree ORDER BY c.pagerank DESC, c.degree DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:hasPagerRank]->(m0:Float {name: 'high pagerank'}),(n:Character)-[r1:hasRank]->(m1:Float {name: 'high degree of centrality'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.name <= 5 RETURN n.name

question: What are the top 5 movies with a single-country language setting and the highest imdbRating?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE size(m.countries) = 1 RETURN m.title, m.imdbRating ORDER BY m.imdbRating DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:hasCountry]->(m0:Country {name: 'single-country language'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.imdbRating DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the top 5 entities that have filed the most transactions with a beneficiary in the United Kingdom?
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity)-[:FILED]->(f:Filing)-[:BENEFITS]->(:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country {name: "United Kingdom"}) WITH e, COUNT(f) AS transaction_count ORDER BY transaction_count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN e.name AS entity_name, transaction_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:Filing]-(m0:Filing)-[r1:BENEFITS]->(m1:Entity {name: 'United Kingdom'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the first 3 movies with plots that involve a natural disaster?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.plot CONTAINS 'natural disaster' RETURN m.title, m.plot LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:plot]->(m0:STRING {name: 'natural disaster'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date ASC LIMIT 3

question: Which users have a profile image URL and follow 'Neo4j'? Show the first 3.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(m:Me {name: 'Neo4j'}) WHERE u.profile_image_url IS NOT NULL RETURN u LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:hashtag]->(m0:Hashtag {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date_of_birth ASC LIMIT 3

question: List the first 3 languages that have been used as original languages in more than 10 movies.
gold_cypher: MATCH (l:Language)<-[:ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE]-(m:Movie) WITH l, count(m) AS movieCount WHERE movieCount > 10 RETURN l.id, l.name ORDER BY movieCount DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Language)<-[r0:ORIGINAL_LANGUAGE]-(m0:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.count(DISTINCT m0) > 10 RETURN n.name

question: Which movies have a runtime longer than 120 minutes?
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.runtime > 120 RETURN m.title, m.runtime
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.runtime > 120 RETURN n.name

question: List 3 movies released in 1995.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.released STARTS WITH '1995' RETURN m.title LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.date.year = 1995 RETURN n.name

question: Who asked the question with the title 'Neo.ClientError.Statement.ExternalResourceFailed error on loading CSV file from local'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question {title: 'Neo.ClientError.Statement.ExternalResourceFailed error on loading CSV file from local'}) RETURN u.display_name AS asked_by
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:asked]-(m0:Question {name: 'Neo.ClientError.Statement.ExternalResourceFailed error on loading CSV file from local'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the top 5 questions with the most downVotes.
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question) RETURN q.title, q.downVotes ORDER BY q.downVotes DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.downVotes DESC LIMIT 5

question: Find the top 3 filings with the earliest begin dates and amounts over 100000.
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing) WHERE f.amount > 100000 RETURN f ORDER BY f.begin ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.amount > 100000 RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.begin_date ASC LIMIT 3

question: List the hashtags that have been used in tweets that contain links and have been posted by "Neo4j".
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {name: "Neo4j"})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) WHERE EXISTS((t)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link)) WITH t MATCH (t)-[:TAGS]->(h:Hashtag) RETURN h.name AS hashtag
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Hashtag)<-[r0:hashtag]-(m0:Tweet)-[r1:contains]->(m1:Link {name: 'link'}),(n:Hashtag)<-[r1:hashtag]-(m1:Tweet {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: "where are the routers located?"
gold_cypher: MATCH (dc:DataCenter)-[:CONTAINS]->(r:Router) RETURN dc.name AS DataCenterName, dc.location AS Location, r.name AS RouterName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Router) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.locations

question: List the top 5 characters with the highest `community`.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) RETURN c.name AS character_name, c.community ORDER BY c.community DESC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:community]->(m0:INTEGER {name: '504'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.community DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the first 3 tags associated with the most questions?
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WITH t, COUNT(q) AS question_count ORDER BY question_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN t.name AS tag_name, question_count
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tag)<-[r0:tagged]-(m0:Question) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.creation_date ASC LIMIT 3

question: What is the maximum score among comments made on questions that have been answered by users who have provided comments to questions that have been tagged with "neo4j" and have a view count greater than 100?
gold_cypher: MATCH (t:Tag {name: "neo4j"})<-[:TAGGED]-(q:Question) WHERE q.view_count > 100 WITH distinct q MATCH (q)<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer)<-[:PROVIDED]-(u:User) WITH distinct u MATCH (u)-[:COMMENTED]->(c:Comment)-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(q2:Question) WITH collect(c.score) AS comment_scores RETURN max(comment_scores) AS max_comment_score
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Comment)<-[r0:createdOn]-(m0:Question)-[r1:tagged]->(m1:Tag {name: 'neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.score > 100 RETURN n.name

question: List the first 5 Entities that are registered in the same jurisdiction as an entity with the name "TIANSHENG INDUSTRY AND TRADING CO., LTD.".
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:Entity {name: "TIANSHENG INDUSTRY AND TRADING CO., LTD."}) WITH e.jurisdiction AS targetJurisdiction MATCH (other:Entity) WHERE other.jurisdiction = targetJurisdiction AND other.name <> "TIANSHENG INDUSTRY AND TRADING CO., LTD." RETURN other.name LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)-[r0:infrac]->(m0:Address)<-[r1:infrac]-(m1:Entity {name: 'TIANSHENG INDUSTRY AND TRADING CO., LTD.'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date_registered ASC LIMIT 5

question: Display the names of businesses with at least two reviews.
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(r:Review) WITH b, count(r) AS reviewsCount WHERE reviewsCount >= 2 RETURN b.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Business) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.number_of_reviews >= 2015-08-29 RETURN n.name

question: List the users who have provided answers to questions they have also asked.
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:ASKED]->(q:Question)<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer) WHERE exists((u)-[:PROVIDED]->(a)) RETURN DISTINCT u.display_name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)<-[r0:receives]-(m0:Question)-[r1:receives]->(m1:User {name: 'Samuel'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.answer_count <= 0 RETURN n.name

question: What is the name of the city that has the least number of organizations headquartered in it?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:City)<-[:IN_CITY]-(o:Organization) WITH c, count(*) AS orgCount ORDER BY orgCount ASC LIMIT 1 RETURN c.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:City)<-[r0:in_city]-(m0:Organization) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.number_of organizations ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the first 3 cities located in the United States of America?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:City)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(co:Country {name: "United States of America"}) RETURN c.name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:City)-[r0:in]->(m0:Country {name: 'United States of America'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.name = 'EzHWv2xKgN92oYDKSjhJ2gw' RETURN n.name

question: List the top 5 customers based on the number of orders placed.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:PURCHASED]->(o:Order) WITH c, COUNT(o) AS orderCount ORDER BY orderCount DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN c.companyName AS customerName, orderCount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Customer)<-[r0:order]-(m0:Order) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.number_of_orders DESC LIMIT 5

question: Who are the top 5 characters with the lowest centrality?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.centrality IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name, c.centrality ORDER BY c.centrality ASC LIMIT 5
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.centrality ASC LIMIT 5

question: List the movies that have a plot mentioning 'kingdom'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.plot CONTAINS 'kingdom' RETURN m.title, m.plot
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:in_GENRE]->(m0:Genre {name: 'kingdom'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: Which 3 production companies have produced films with a runtime longer than 180 minutes?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:ProductionCompany)<-[:PRODUCED_BY]-(m:Movie) WHERE m.runtime > 180 RETURN p.name AS ProductionCompany, COUNT(m) AS NumberOfMovies ORDER BY NumberOfMovies DESC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:ProductionCompany)<-[r0:ProducedBy]-(m0:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.runtime > 180 RETURN n.name

question: Identify the products that are part of orders that were required to be shipped before '1997-01-01'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:ORDERS]->(p:Product) WHERE o.requiredDate < '1997-01-01' RETURN DISTINCT p.productName AS ProductName, p.productID AS ProductID
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)-[r0:partOf]->(m0:Category {name: 'order'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.date < date('1997-01-01') RETURN n.name

question: Which entities are concerned in filings with an amount greater than 750000?
gold_cypher: MATCH (f:Filing)-[:CONCERNS]->(e:Entity) WHERE f.amount > 750000 RETURN e.name AS concerned_entity, f.amount AS filing_amount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Entity)<-[r0:concerned]-(m0:Filing) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.amount > 750000 RETURN n.name

question: Which streams are part of a team created before 2015?
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Stream)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(t:Team) WHERE t.createdAt < datetime('2015-01-01T00:00:00Z') RETURN s
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Stream)<-[r0:partOfTeam]-(m0:Team) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.date < date('2015-05-22T10:39:53.259969Z') RETURN n.name

question: What are the names of all DataCenters located in 'Iceland, Rekjavik'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (dc:DataCenter {location: 'Iceland, Rekjavik'}) RETURN dc.name
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:DataCenter)-[r0:in]->(m0:STRING {name: 'Iceland, Rekjavik'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: How many machines are there in rack 10 of DataCenter DC1?
gold_cypher: MATCH (dc:DataCenter {name: 'DC1'})-[:CONTAINS]->(rack:Rack {rack: 10})-[:HOLDS]->(machine:Machine) RETURN count(machine) AS numberOfMachines
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Machine)-[r0:rack]->(m0:Rack {name: '10'}),(n:Machine)-[r1:DataCenter]->(m1:DataCenter {name: 'DC1'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

question: What are the names of the first 3 users who are both moderators and VIPs for any stream?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User) WHERE exists{ (u)-[:MODERATOR]->(:Stream) }    AND exists{ (u)-[:VIP]->(:Stream) } RETURN u.name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:User)-[r0:MODERATOR]->(m0:Stream)-[r1:VIP]->(m1:User {name: 'VIP'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.name = 'first 3' RETURN n.name

question: List the characters who interact in book 1 with a weight exactly 291.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c1:Character)-[r:INTERACTS1 {weight: 291}]->(c2:Character) RETURN c1.name AS Character1, c2.name AS Character2
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:INTERACTS]->(m0:Character {name: 'book 1'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.weight >= 291 RETURN n.name

question: Find movies where the sum of the revenue and budget is more than 1 billion dollars.
gold_cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE (m.revenue + m.budget) > 1000000000 RETURN m
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.revenue + n бюджет > 100000000 RETURN n.name

question: What is the minimum `weight` of the `INTERACTS3` relationship between characters with a `book1BetweennessCentrality` greater than 400?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c1:Character)-[r:INTERACTS3]->(c2:Character) WHERE c1.book1BetweennessCentrality > 400 RETURN min(r.weight)
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:INTERACTS3]->(m0:Character {name: 'INTERACTS3'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.weight < 400 RETURN n.name

question: Which characters have the lowest 'book1BetweennessCentrality' and are part of community 579? Provide first 3 results.
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.book1BetweennessCentrality IS NOT NULL AND c.community = 579 RETURN c ORDER BY c.book1BetweennessCentrality ASC LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Character)-[r0:hasRank]->(m0:Rank {name: 'book1BetweennessCentrality'}),(n:Character)-[r1:partOfGroup]->(m1:Group {name: '579'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.book1BetweennessCentrality ASC LIMIT 3

question: What is the most recent tweet posted by "Neo4j"?
gold_cypher: MATCH (u:User {name: "Neo4j"})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet) RETURN t.text ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Tweet)<-[r0:POSTS]-(m0:User {name: 'Neo4j'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.creation_at DESC LIMIT 1

question: Who are the first 3 persons mentioned as CEOs of organizations in the technology industry?
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Person)<-[:HAS_CEO]-(o:Organization)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(c:IndustryCategory) WHERE c.name CONTAINS 'Technology' RETURN p.name AS name LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:CEO]-(m0:Organization)-[r1:hasCategory]->(m1:IndustryCategory {name: 'technology'}) WITH DISTINCT n LIMIT 3

question: List the productName of all products supplied by the supplier with supplierID equal to '1'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier {supplierID: '1'})-[:SUPPLIES]->(p:Product) RETURN p.productName
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Product)<-[r0:suppliedBy]-(m0:Supplier)-[r1:supplierID]->(m1:STRING {name: '1'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the total `amount` of filings where the `originator_bank` is located in a country with a `tld` that is present in the top 5 most frequent `tld` values?
gold_cypher: MATCH (c:Country)<-[:COUNTRY]-(:Entity) WITH c.tld AS tld, count(*) AS frequency ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 5 WITH collect(tld) AS topTlds MATCH (f:Filing)-[:ORIGINATOR]->(e:Entity)-[:COUNTRY]->(country:Country) WHERE country.tld IN topTlds RETURN sum(f.amount) AS total_amount
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Filing)<-[r0:Filing]-(m0:Entity {name: 'originator_bank'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.amount > 1.18 RETURN n.name

question: What are the first 3 questions that have comments with a score of 3?
gold_cypher: MATCH (q:Question)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(c:Comment) WHERE c.score = 3 RETURN q LIMIT 3
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Question)-[r0:COMMENTED]->(m0:Comment) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.score = 3 RETURN n.name

question: List the countries where organizations with a revenue less than $10 million are located.

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Organization) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.revenue < 1000000 RETURN n.country

question: Who are the top 3 CEOs of dissolved organizations?

question: What are the top 5 countries where the most movies originate from based on the 'countries' property of movies?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:hasCountry]->(m0:Country) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.date ASC LIMIT 5

question: List the top 5 actors by number of different genres they've acted in.
gold_cypher: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH a, count(distinct g) AS genreCount ORDER BY genreCount DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN a.name AS actor, genreCount AS numberOfGenres
pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Actor)-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(m1:Movie {name: '862'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Actor)-[r0:ACTED_IN]->(m0:Movie {name: 'Toy Story'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.number_of_genres DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the top 5 movies with the most distinct countries of origin?

pred_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.country_origin DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which streams have the most followers but fewer than 1 million total views?

question: What is the average number of followers for users who follow 'Neo4j'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (neo4j:User {screen_name: 'neo4j'})<-[:FOLLOWS]-(follower:User) WITH avg(follower.followers) AS average_followers RETURN average_followers

question: Find the business with the most reviews.
gold_cypher: MATCH (b:Business)<-[:REVIEWS]-(review:Review) WITH b, count(review) AS reviewCount RETURN b.name AS businessName, reviewCount ORDER BY reviewCount DESC LIMIT 1
